overall.description: A cinematic cutscene from a fantasy video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing wizard characters conversing on castle grounds near a Quidditch pitch, transitioning to an aerial drone shot revealing a large Slytherin house banner and the full castle complex.

segments.scene_description: On the grassy grounds of a medieval castle, a group of wizards in dark robes stands conversing. The scene is framed by two stone towers with decorative bunting strung between them, while red and gold banners hang from the castle wall behind. The camera remains stationary, capturing the interaction as one wizard gestures while speaking.

scene_state.functional_zone: Quidditch pitch viewing area with house banners

camera moves past the large Slytherin banner revealing the full castle and pitch

agents.ego_description: flying camera moving past the Slytherin house banner to reveal the expansive Quidditch pitch and castle

entered.detail: large vertical banner with green and silver argyle pattern and snake emblem
full view of the castle complex with multiple towers and spires
large open grassy field of the Quidditch pitch
string of colorful triangular pennant flags along the pitch edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an aerial view dominated by a massive green and silver Slytherin house banner with a snake emblem. The camera drifts past the banner, revealing the full grandeur of Hogwarts castle and the expansive Quidditch pitch below, marked by colorful pennant banners along the field edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot begins with an intimate ground-level interaction among wizards that gradually expands into a sweeping aerial vista of the castle grounds. It starts on the grassy lawn where figures in dark robes converse between two stone towers adorned with decorative bunting and red and gold banners. As the perspective shifts upward, the camera ascends away from the group to be momentarily dominated by a massive green and silver Slytherin banner featuring a snake emblem. The scene then opens wide as the camera drifts past the fabric, revealing the full grandeur of the castle complex and the expansive Quidditch pitch below. Finally, the view settles on the vast landscape, highlighting the colorful pennant banners lining the edges of the sporting field.
